context: Tests whether Swift Testing guidance keeps unit tests in Swift Testing while preserving XCTest, XCUITest, performance, and snapshot boundaries.

checklist.name: Unit logic ownership
checklist.description: Uses Swift Testing for pure unit or business logic tests such as the price calculator.

checklist.name: Async event testing
checklist.description: Uses confirmation or Swift concurrency patterns for async coupon events instead of sleeps.

checklist.name: UI automation boundary
checklist.description: Keeps UI automation with XCTest and XCUITest.

checklist.name: Performance boundary
checklist.description: Keeps performance measurement with XCTest measure or XCTMetric-style tooling.

checklist.name: Snapshot boundary
checklist.description: Keeps common visual snapshot testing flows in XCTest or dedicated snapshot tooling and includes dark mode and large Dynamic Type coverage.

checklist.name: Migration organization
checklist.description: States that XCTest and Swift Testing can coexist during migration while recommending clear file or target organization when it reduces confusion.
